		Parcel Number:17 00420002035 *Block:--Lot:3Subdivision:LORIDANS OVERLOOK

Remove the 34DBH oak tree located in the front yard of the property, immediately left of the driveway. This tree exhibits a pronounced lean toward a major roadway and adjacent pedestrian/bicycle pathway, increasing the likelihood of impact to vehicular traffic, cyclists, and pedestrians should a structural failure occur. Due to the tree’s orientation and target-rich environment, any limb, stem, or whole-tree failure could result in significant property damage, personal injury, or obstruction of public access.
